trustNote: Free cancellation up to 24 hours before arrival.
roomOptions: Our portfolio comprises Standard, Deluxe Ocean-View, and Penthouse Suite categories, each governed by occupancy ceilings, blackout windows, and minimum-stay thresholds that vary by season and yield class.
legalDisclaimer: By proceeding, the Guest acknowledges that all displayed tariffs are indicative and non-binding until a written confirmation is issued, and that "Seabreeze Hotel" reserves the right to amend, suspend, or rescind any reservation under applicable jurisdiction and force-majeure provisions.
cancellationTerms: Refunds equal to {refundPct} of the prepaid amount are remitted within {refundDays} business days, exclusive of weekends, statutory holidays, and any non-refundable surcharges levied by third-party providers or payment intermediaries.
